item.title: A goal to be more active on Github in 2024
item.dc:creator: Peter Hoang
item.description:
I was never active on Github. That may sound strange to many, especially given that I’ve been in software for almost 1.5 decade.

Before, I was so busy writing close-sourced software products that I didn’t have the time and mind to think about being active on Github. Many of the things I built were/are free to use as a product (such as this old AI tool), but they weren’t open-sourced.

In 2024, as I’m back to school and building a new career path, I set a goal to become more active on Github. Given my workload, I want to focus on simple, yet helpful, actions that I can maintain to build up my muscle strength of being active on Github. Some of these actions include: - Share useful AI tools and papers. And write comment on them. - Star the repos I like. - Continue to update and add new content to this Github blog. (And although I’m familiar with Wordpress, which I used for my main blog, I quite enjoyed writing posts like this on Github pages using markdown and Vim.)

Hope to see you around and keep me accountable at this Github blog and my Github repo.
